sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n449" key="a)ge/mistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγέμιστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n449.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not put on board ship</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στέμφυλα</foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">P Aurom.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1b34</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(i B.
